description: Specialising in fashionable style, and crafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials and hardware in their products. This bag is a love-forever classic that you can wear with colour-pop brights, understated outfits or with colour blocked ensembles. Versatile, stylish, accommodating and a utility-essential, this bag doubles as a classy carry-all. Made of textured leatherette with metallic brand badge on the front Two leatherette handles and one shoulder strap that is adjustable and detachable One main roomy compartment with a zippered pocket and two pouches Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
